You are applying code migration fixes to a single file. File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/console-plugin/source/src/components/pipeline-builder/synced-editor/index.tsx Apply ALL of the following 2 fixes to this file: ### Fix 1 Lines: 130, 134 Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]: Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' Incident context: componentName: Button module: @patternfly/react-core propName: variant propValue: danger Fix strategy: Strategy: PropTypeChange Component: Button Prop: variant From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change. Code contexts: ``` (line 130): 129

{t('Switching to form view will delete any invalid YAML.')}

130 After: After: Incident context: componentName: Button module: @patternfly/react-core parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core parentName: Alert Fix strategy: Strategy: LlmAssisted Component: Button Prop: icon This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change. Code contexts: ``` (line 130): 129

130
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: Button.variant type change
The `variant` prop type on `Button` had `'stateful'` added. Looking at the code:
- Line 130: `<Button variant="danger" ...>` — `"danger"` is still valid in the new type. **No change needed.**
- Line 134: `<Button variant="secondary" ...>` — `"secondary"` is still valid in the new type. **No change needed.**

This fix is informational — the type was expanded (a new value `'stateful'` was added), but the existing values used in the code (`"danger"` and `"secondary"`) remain valid. No code changes required.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
Looking at the Button usages:
- Line 130-132: `<Button variant="danger" onClick={onClickYAMLWarningConfirm}>{t('Switch and delete')}</Button>` — The children is text only (`t('Switch and delete')`), no icon element. **No change needed.**
- Line 134-136: `<Button variant="secondary" onClick={onClickYAMLWarningCancel}>{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — The children is text only (`t('Cancel')`), no icon element. **No change needed.**

Neither Button contains icon children from `@patternfly/react-icons`. These Buttons only have text children. The rule was triggered because they're inside an Alert component, but there are no icons to move to the `icon` prop.

Both fixes require no actual code changes — the file is already correct as-is.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Button.variant type changed): **No change needed** — The existing values `"danger"` (line 130) and `"secondary"` (line 134) are both still valid in the new type union. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (icon children to `icon` prop on Button): **No change needed** — Neither Button instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Both Buttons only have text children (`{t('Switch and delete')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), so there are no icons to migrate to the `icon` prop.
